Based on my visual inspection of the molecule, I can now identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 8 (C:8).

## Summary

**Atom 8 (Carbon) Neighbor Atoms:**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 6 | C (Carbon) |
| 9 | N (Nitrogen) |
| 25 | H (Hydrogen) |
| 26 | H (Hydrogen) |

**geomconf_index:** 8748

Atom 8 (Carbon) has 4 covalent bonds, which is the expected valency for carbon. It is bonded to:
- One carbon atom (C:6)
- One nitrogen atom (N:9)
- Two hydrogen atoms (H:25 and H:26)

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 8, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
